untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) volatility percentile rank calculation (50th/35th percentile) — not available as direct indicators; (2) volatility trend slope calculation over 14 days — slope operator not in allowed operators list; (3) IV rank — not in allowed indicators (only ATR-based volatility available). The core diagnostic logic of volatility behavior as trend confirmation cannot be fully expressed with available indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using atr_14 as volatility proxy and hvol_20 as volatility level reference. Entry requires elevated volatility (atr_14 above historical vol) and price beyond 14-period MA in trend direction. Exit triggers on volatility contraction. Stop loss set to specified 3% drawdown. However, the percentile-based thresholds and slope calculations are untranslatable with current operator set.
